de.uka.ilkd.key.proof

Class FormulaTagManager

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.proof.FormulaTagManager

  • public class FormulaTagManager
extends java.lang.Object
    Class to manage the tags of the formulas of a sequent (node). Instances of this class are stored by instances of the Goal class, and are not immutable

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.Object clone() 
      FormulaTagManager copy() 
      long getAgeForTag(FormulaTag p_tag) 
      ImmutableList<FormulaChangeInfo> getModifications(FormulaTag p_tag) 
      PosInOccurrence getPosForTag(FormulaTag p_tag) 
      FormulaTag getTagForPos(PosInOccurrence p_pio) 
      void sequentChanged(Goal source, SequentChangeInfo sci) 

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Method Detail

      • getTagForPos

        public FormulaTag getTagForPos(PosInOccurrence p_pio)
        Returns:
        the tag of the formula at the given position

      • getPosForTag

        public PosInOccurrence getPosForTag(FormulaTag p_tag)
        Returns:
        The current position of the formula with the given tag; the sequent attribute of the returned PosInOccurrence can be obsolete and refer to a previous node. If no formula is assigned to the given tag, null is returned

      • getAgeForTag

        public long getAgeForTag(FormulaTag p_tag)
        Returns:
        The age (as obtained by Goal.getTime()) of the formula, i.e. the time when the formula was introduced resp. when the last modification was applied to the formula. If no formula is assigned to the given tag, 0 is returned

      • getModifications

        public ImmutableList<FormulaChangeInfo> getModifications(FormulaTag p_tag)
        Returns:
        All modifications that were applied to the formula with the given tag since the creation of the tag, starting with the most recent one

      • sequentChanged

        public void sequentChanged(Goal source,
                           SequentChangeInfo sci)

      • clone

        public java.lang.Object clone()
        Overrides:
        clone in class java.lang.Object

      • copy

        public FormulaTagManager copy()
